expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: cross-section interaction audit catches template x pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly names both focus areas under “Target capability (Phase 5a)” and ties them to fixture evidence: “Template × pause-mode” and “Prompt-editor-open state…”. It further lists required Phase 5a enforcement entries: “1. Template × pause-mode … 2. Prompt-editor-open state × close/confirm dialog behavior”.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: result.md is Phase 5a-scoped throughout: “Target capability (Phase 5a)”, references “skill_snapshot/references/review-rubric-phase5a.md”, concludes “Fail (blocking)” based on “Phase 5a Cross-Section Interaction Audit”, and includes a dedicated section “## Output alignment to phase5a” stating it is “explicitly Phase 5a-scoped”.
